findings.evidence: `rg -n "mem_pointSet_.*swap|swapRows|swapColumns" TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid` shows swap definitions and apply/involution lemmas in `Commutation.lean:36-67`, but no swap-specific `mem_pointSet_*` lemmas; relabel has the corresponding API at `Diagram.lean:224` and `Diagram.lean:238`.
findings.fix: Add simp lemmas restating point-set membership under swaps, specialized from `GridState.mem_pointSet_relabelRows` and `GridState.mem_pointSet_relabelColumns`, so users need not unfold `swapRows`/`swapColumns`.
findings.issue: `GridState.swapRows`/`swapColumns` expose public state operations without `mem_pointSet_swapRows` and `mem_pointSet_swapColumns` characteristic lemmas.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "mem_[OX]Set_.*swap|mem_[OX]Set_relabel|def swap" TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid` shows diagram swap definitions at `Commutation.lean:76` and `Commutation.lean:80`, while only relabel has marking-set transport lemmas at `Diagram.lean:412`, `Diagram.lean:419`, `Diagram.lean:426`, and `Diagram.lean:432`.
findings.fix: Add `[simp]` marking-set membership lemmas for diagram swaps, mirroring the relabel lemmas with `Equiv.swap a b`, so commutation users can rewrite swapped markings without unfolding the diagram relabeling definitions.
findings.issue: `GridDiagram.swapRows`/`swapColumns` expose public diagram operations without `mem_OSet_swapRows`, `mem_XSet_swapRows`, `mem_OSet_swapColumns`, and `mem_XSet_swapColumns`.

summary: The relabeling API is now characterized at both state and diagram level, but the public swap specializations lack the corresponding point-set and marking-set transport lemmas. Users of the commutation-facing API still have to unfold swaps or reason through fields to move between swapped diagrams and their `OSet`/`XSet`.
